Meaning.En: A series of thoughts, images, and sensations occurring in the mind during sleep.
Meaning.Example: I had a vivid dream about flying over the ocean last night.

Situation.Vi: Mô tả nội dung giấc mơ khi vừa tỉnh dậy.
Situation.En: Describing the content of a dream upon waking up.

Situation.Vi: Chia sẻ ước mơ hoặc khát vọng trong đời.
Situation.En: Sharing a personal aspiration or life goal (idiomatic use).

Meaning.En: To experience thoughts, images, and sensations during sleep.
Meaning.Example: She dreams about her childhood home every time she visits the countryside.

Situation.Vi: Nói về việc nằm mơ trong lúc ngủ.
Situation.En: Talking about experiencing dreams while asleep.

Situation.Vi: Mô tả việc ước mơ điều gì đó (thường là điều không thực tế).
Situation.En: Expressing a wish or fantasy, often unrealistic (e.g., "I dream of winning the lottery").

Meaning.Vi: ngủ, nghỉ ngơi (ngôn ngữ cổ/nghĩa bóng)
Meaning.En: To be in a state of rest or inactivity; to sleep (archaic or poetic usage).
Meaning.Example: He dreamt the afternoon away in the hammock.

Situation.Vi: Ngôn ngữ văn học cổ, mô tả việc ngủ say hoặc nghỉ ngơi lâu.
Situation.En: Poetic or literary usage describing prolonged or deep sleep.
